mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId}
SELECT * FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chapter_quiz_results (user_id, chapter_id, total_score, max_score, correct_count, total_count, attempt_count, is_passed, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{totalScore}, #{maxScore}, #{correctCount}, #{totalCount}, #{attemptCount}, #{isPassed}, #{submittedAt})

INSERT INTO chapter_quiz_results (user_id, chapter_id, total_score, max_score, correct_count, total_count, attempt_count, is_passed, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{chapterId}, #{totalScore}, #{maxScore}, #{correctCount}, #{totalCount}, #{attemptCount}, #{isPassed}, #{submittedAt}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, chapter_id) DO UPDATE SET total_score = EXCLUDED.total_score, max_score = EXCLUDED.max_score, correct_count = EXCLUDED.correct_count, total_count = EXCLUDED.total_count, attempt_count = chapter_quiz_results.attempt_count + 1, is_passed = EXCLUDED.is_passed, submitted_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total_score), 0) FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapter_quiz_results WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_passed = TRUE

SELECT c.id AS course_id, COALESCE(AVG(cqr.total_score), 0) AS average_score FROM courses c INNER JOIN chapters ch ON c.id = ch.course_id LEFT JOIN chapter_quiz_results cqr ON ch.id = cqr.chapter_id AND cqr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE c.published = TRUE GROUP BY c.id
